title: Star Wars Adventures 8: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 8}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures08-Book.png]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 8:
The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[May]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 8: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 8|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 8]], which was released in [[May]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0439458870 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 7: The Ghostling Children|The Ghostling Children]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 9: Capture Arawynne|Capture Arawynne]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 8: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker''''' was the eighth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series.This book is a reprint of ''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]''. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 8|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 8]] in [[May]] [[2003]]. ==Publisher's summary== '''Now flashback to the time before Episode I''.' ''Anakin Skywalker and his friends have helped to free a group of Ghostling slaves. Now their owner, Gardulla the Hutt, wants to find out who's responsible. And the Hutt wants revenge.'' ''Some of the best trackers on the planet of Tatooine are searching for Anakin.'' ''Will he be caught?'' ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures08-Book.png|Novel cover File:Adventures08-GameBook.jpg|Game Book cover File:Adventures08-GameBook-Full.jpg|Game Book cover ==Appearances== {{:Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ScholasticAdventuresNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: თავგადასავლები 8: ნადირობა ანაკინ სკაიუოკერზე }} [[Category:Star Wars Adventures books|Adventures 08]]
